Ref: Syn/CS/SE/BM/2022-23/Oct/10 
October 25, 2022 
To, 
The Manager,  
BSE Limited 
Corporate Relationship Department 
Dalal Street, Mumbai – 400 001  
To, 
The Manager, 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Corporate Communication Department 
Bandra (EAST), Mumbai – 400 051 
Scrip Code: 539268 
Scrip Symbol: SYNGENE 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
Subject: Intimation of transcript for Q2 FY23 post earnings call 
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 
2015 (“SEBI Listing Regulations”), please find the link for the transcript of the Q2 FY23 Earnings Call 
conducted on October 20, 2022 and uploaded on website of the Company on October 25, 2022. 
Particulars 
Website link 
Earnings Call Transcript
https://cdn.syngeneintl.com/2022/10/25221309/FY23-Q2-
conference-call-transcript.pdf 
The Investors Presentation was submitted to the Stock exchanges on October 19, 2022 and uploaded 
on the website on the same day. 
Request to kindly take this intimation on record. 
Thanking You, 
Yours faithfully, 
For SYNGENE INTERNATIONAL LIMITED 
____________________ 
Priyadarshini Mahapatra 
Company Secretary and Compliance Officer 
 Syngene International Limited 
 Biocon SEZ, Biocon Park, Plot No. 2 & 3, 
 Bommasandra Industrial Area, IV Phase, 
 Jigani Link Road, Bengaluru 560099, 
 Karnataka, India.
